- **[CNTRLPLANE-3222: Migrate self-managed Azure e2e tests to v2 Ginkgo framework](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3222)**

- **[OCPBUGS-81746: \[backport release 4.20\] HCP: hypershift-operator ignores AWS AMI override in NodePool specification causing failures in AWS ISO (classified) regions](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-81746)**
  - Merged backport PR: Honor AWS AMI override in NodePool token generation (release-4.20)
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8183

- **[OCPBUGS-82159: Ignition server fails to generate payload for OCP 5.0 releases](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-82159)**
  - Merged PR: fix ignition-server to use major+minor version comparison for OCP 5.0 payloads
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8182

- **[OCPBUGS-82301: Catalog image resolution fails for OCP 5.0 due to minor-only version comparison](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-82301)**
  - Opened fix for catalog version cap to use semver comparison for OCP 5.0
  - PR merged
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8195

- **[OCPBUGS-83285: LatestSupportedVersion set to 5.0 must be removed from release-4.22](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-83285)**

  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8216

- **[OCPBUGS-83389: HyperShift version skew validation rejects valid cross-major-version NodePools (HC=5.0, NP=4.x)](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-83389)**
  - Opened and merged fix to normalize OCP 5.x versions for skew and release validation
